member.name: T:TokenInfo
member.summary:
Gets information about a fungible or non-fungible token instance.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: F:TokenInfo.TokenId
member.summary: The ID of the token for which information is requested.

member.name: F:TokenInfo.Name
member.summary: Name of token.

member.name: F:TokenInfo.Symbol
member.summary: Symbol of token.

member.name: F:TokenInfo.Decimals
member.summary: The amount of decimal places that this token supports.

member.name: F:TokenInfo.TotalSupply
member.summary: Total Supply of token.

member.name: F:TokenInfo.TreasuryAccountId
member.summary: The ID of the account which is set as Treasury

member.name: F:TokenInfo.AdminKey
member.summary: The key which can perform update/delete operations on the token. If empty, the token can be perceived as immutable (not being able to be updated/deleted)

member.name: F:TokenInfo.KycKey
member.summary: The key which can grant or revoke KYC of an account for the token's transactions. If empty, KYC is not required, and KYC grant or revoke operations are not possible.

member.name: F:TokenInfo.FreezeKey
member.summary: The key which can freeze or unfreeze an account for token transactions. If empty, freezing is not possible

member.name: F:TokenInfo.WipeKey
member.summary: The key which can wipe token balance of an account. If empty, wipe is not possible

member.name: F:TokenInfo.SupplyKey
member.summary: The key which can change the supply of a token. The key is used to sign Token Mint/Burn operations

member.name: F:TokenInfo.FeeScheduleKey
member.summary: The key which can change the custom fees of the token; if not set, the fees are immutable

member.name: F:TokenInfo.DefaultFreezeStatus
member.summary: The default Freeze status (not applicable, frozen or unfrozen) of Hedera accounts relative to this token. FreezeNotApplicable is returned if Token Freeze Key is empty. Frozen is returned if Token Freeze Key is set and defaultFreeze is set to true. Unfrozen is returned if Token Freeze Key is set and defaultFreeze is set to false

member.name: F:TokenInfo.DefaultKycStatus
member.summary: The default KYC status (KycNotApplicable or Revoked) of Hedera accounts relative to this token. KycNotApplicable is returned if KYC key is not set, otherwise Revoked

member.name: F:TokenInfo.IsDeleted
member.summary: Specifies whether the token was deleted or not

member.name: F:TokenInfo.AutoRenewAccount
member.summary: An account which will be automatically charged to renew the token's expiration, at autoRenewPeriod interval

member.name: F:TokenInfo.AutoRenewPeriod
member.summary: The interval at which the auto-renew account will be charged to extend the token's expiry

member.name: F:TokenInfo.ExpirationTime
member.summary: The epoch second at which the token will expire

member.name: F:TokenInfo.TokenMemo
member.summary: The memo associated with the token

member.name: F:TokenInfo.CustomFees
member.summary: The custom fees to be assessed during a CryptoTransfer that transfers units of this token

member.name: F:TokenInfo.TokenType
member.summary: The token type

member.name: F:TokenInfo.SupplyType
member.summary: The token supply type

member.name: F:TokenInfo.MaxSupply
member.summary: For tokens of type FUNGIBLE_COMMON - The Maximum number of fungible tokens that can be in circulation. For tokens of type NonFungibleUnique - the maximum number of NFTs (serial numbers) that can be in circulation

member.name: F:TokenInfo.PauseKey
member.summary: The Key which can pause and unpause the Token.

member.name: F:TokenInfo.PauseStatus
member.summary: Specifies whether the token is paused or not. Null if pauseKey is not set.

member.name: F:TokenInfo.Metadata
member.summary: Represents the metadata of the token definition.

member.name: F:TokenInfo.MetadataKey
member.summary: The key which can change the metadata of a token (token definition and individual NFTs).

member.name: F:TokenInfo.LedgerId
member.summary: The ledger ID the response was returned from; please see HIP-198 for the network-specific IDs.

member.name: M:TokenInfo.KycStatusFromProtobuf(Proto.TokenKycStatus)
member.summary: Is kyc required?

member.name: M:TokenInfo.PauseStatusFromProtobuf(Proto.TokenPauseStatus)
member.summary: Are we paused?

member.name: M:TokenInfo.FreezeStatusFromProtobuf(Proto.TokenFreezeStatus)
member.summary: Are we frozen?

member.name: M:TokenInfo.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a token info object from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TokenInfo.FromProtobuf(Proto.TokenGetInfoResponse)
member.summary: Create a token info object from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenInfo.CustomFeesFromProto(Proto.TokenInfo)
member.summary: Create custom fee list from protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenInfo.ToBytes
member.summary: Create the byte array.

member.name: M:TokenInfo.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Create the protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenInfo.KycStatusToProtobuf(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a kyc status protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenInfo.PauseStatusToProtobuf(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a pause status protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenInfo.FreezeStatusToProtobuf(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a token freeze status protobuf.
